title: Change Orders Feature - UI Exploration Report

screenshots.name: change-orders-list
screenshots.description: Change Orders list page showing all change orders

workflows.name: Create Change Order
steps: Navigate to Change Orders list page
Fill in CO Number, Title, Description
Verify new CO appears in list

workflows.name: Submit Change Order for Approval
steps: Click on a draft change order row

workflows.name: Approve Change Order
steps: Navigate to change order detail (status: pending)

workflows.name: Add Line Items
steps: Fill in description, quantity, unit cost
Verify total is calculated (quantity × unit cost)
Verify line item appears in table

workflows.name: Edit Line Item
steps: Navigate to change order Line Items tab

workflows.name: Filter and Search
steps: Use status tabs to filter (Draft, Pending, Approved, etc.)
Enter search term in search box
Verify filtered results show only matching COs
Clear filters to see all COs again
